title: Clear Water-texture pack
description: Experience perfectly clear water in Minecraft
body: **Clear Water is a simple and family-friendly Minecraft resource pack that transforms all water into fully transparent blocks. This allows you to see underwater clearly, making exploration of oceans, rivers, and caves easier and more enjoyable. It is lightweight, requires no mods, and works with vanilla Minecraft. Perfect for players who want a clean, unobstructed underwater view without altering other game elements.**
